data.title: ReelTime's Annual Financials Reveal Major Capital Structure Improvements Designed to Protect Shareholder Value and Reduce Potential Dilution
data.description: Around 685 million potential shares have been decreased or removed, maintaining a stable share count since July 2025. ReelTime has underscored debt reduction, dilution discipline, and capital stewardship in a market dominated by Microsoft (MSFT), NVIDIA (NVDA), and Alphabet (GOOGL).

data.title: Waste Pro USA, Inc. Announces the Reoffering of $120.0 million of Solid Waste Disposal Revenue Bonds
data.description: In Longwood, Florida on April 2, 2026, Waste Pro USA, Inc. shared news of successfully finalizing the sale and reoffering of the Florida Development. Waste Pro is a private company operating in the waste management sector, specializing in non-hazardous waste services including collection, transfer, recycling, and disposal. This recent transaction marks a significant milestone for Waste Pro in expanding its operations and services.

data.title: FP Trading Joins the Financial Commission, Strengthening Client Protection
data.description: On April 2, 2026, in Dubai, UAE, FP Trading revealed its recent membership with the Financial Commission, an autonomous external entity designed to resolve disputes within the forex and CFD trading sector. As a part of this collaboration, clients of FP Trading will now have the advantage of...

data.title: AZCOMP Technologies Earns CGM Reseller of the Year Award
data.description: Arizona-based AZCOMP Technologies, a prominent provider of medical billing software, was recently awarded the prestigious title of CGM Reseller of the Year for the 21st consecutive year. The accolade was bestowed upon them at the CGM Medisoft VAR Awards Banquet in Dallas on March 31, 2026. This recognition underscores their dominance in the industry and reaffirms their position as the top Medisoft reseller in the nation. This achievement highlights their consistent excellence and dedication to delivering top-notch services.

data.title: CALL FOR VOLUNTEERS: NATIONWIDE CLEAN-UP DAY AT HISTORIC SITES
data.description: In its 30th year, Park Day is calling on volunteers nationwide to participate in the restoration of historic sites in their local areas. Taking place this April, the event will see thousands of volunteers mobilizing at historic sites throughout the country.

data.title: Kai Names Nick Degnan Chief Revenue Officer as Demand Surges for Machine-Speed Security
data.description: A go-to-market leader, who has served as CRO three times, has recently joined Kai as companies transition from fragmented silos and manual workflows to autonomous defense in SAN JOSE, California. The move comes as Kai, the company known for developing the initial agentic AI cybersecurity platform, aims to enhance security measures amidst growing complexities. This development unfolded on April 2, 2026.

data.title: Finite Carbon Announces Landmark Issuance of High-Quality Carbon Credits Under ACR IFM v2.1
data.description: Philadelphia-based Finite Carbon, a prominent carbon project developer, has disclosed the issuance of forest carbon credits for its Northeast Carry Woodlands project in Maine. The project, spanning 212,806 acres, has obtained credits under the Improved Forest Management (IFM) v2.1 methodology of the American Carbon Registry. This achievement positions it as among the initiators and most extensive projects to be registered under ACR's latest IFM methodology. Notably, all credits from the Northeast Carry project are adorned with the Core Carbon Principles (CCP) label, signifying their compliance with standards in the voluntary carbon market sector.

data.title: MODALO Unveils German Handcrafted Luxury Watch Winders
data.description: In Hamburg, Germany, MODALO is revolutionizing luxury watch maintenance with cutting-edge watch winding technology. This advancement guarantees the preservation of long-term value for automatic watches.

data.title: Kunes Auto & RV Group Extends United Way Campaign After Strong March Sales Push, Commits to Reaching Full $100,000 Goal
data.description: Car dealerships in the Milwaukee area have exceeded sales of 550 vehicles and have committed to donating until they reach a milestone of 1,000 cars sold. One of the rapidly expanding dealership groups in the Midwest, Kunes Auto & RV Group, located in Delavan, Wisconsin, has made this pledge.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Kai/
data.description: Kai has appointed Nick Degnan as Chief Revenue Officer in response to a significant increase in demand for machine-speed security. This announcement was made on 02-Apr-2026. The company saw a surge in demand for its security services, prompting this strategic move. Nick Degnan will now lead the revenue department as the company navigates this period of growth. For more details, please refer to the updated news release.

data.title: Blue Yonder Named a Leader in the Inaugural 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ Supply Chain Planning Solutions: Discrete Industries
data.description: In Dallas, Blue Yonder, an AI company specializing in supply chain, has been named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Supply Chain Planning Solutions (Discrete Industries). This recognition is based on the company's Ability to Execute and Completeness of Vision. Blue Yonder has a strong track record in the Supply Chain Planning Solutions space, being recognized for over ten years. This recent acknowledgment signifies the robustness and efficacy of Blue Yonder's solutions in supporting supply chain operations.
